justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently understood the user's preferred time of day (around 3 PM) and adjusted the search window accordingly, even when the exact date was unavailable.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered alternative dates and times when the initial request was unavailable, and successfully found a slot close to the user's preference.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made multiple API calls in a single turn to find suitable appointments, minimizing unnecessary back-and-forth.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear updates and offering relevant alternatives.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from initial unavailability by expanding the search to nearby days and times, maintaining context throughout the process.
